overview.description: The Gadsden Dynamic Multi-Asset ETF (GDMA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio that may hold any asset class. The fund seeks total return. GDMA was launched on Nov 14, 2018 and is issued by Alpha Architect.
